privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how we process personal data of the platform's users. Baseline document, customizable per tenant.

sections.heading: Data controller
sections.body: The data controller of the leads' data is the customer using the platform; the service provider acts as data processor under Art. 28 GDPR.

sections.heading: Data processed and purposes
sections.body: We process account data (name, email) for authentication and service delivery, and the data entered by users to manage the relationship with leads. Data is minimized and retained according to the retention policy.

sections.heading: Legal basis
sections.body: Processing is based on the performance of the contract, legal obligations and, where applicable, the data subject's consent.

sections.heading: Sub-processors
sections.body: To deliver the service we rely on infrastructure providers (hosting, database, transactional email, Google reCAPTCHA). The up-to-date list is available on request.

sections.heading: Data subject rights
sections.body: You have the right of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection, as well as withdrawal of consent. You can exercise your rights by contacting the controller.

cookie.title: Cookie policy
cookie.intro: This page describes the cookies used by the platform and how to manage your preferences, in line with the Italian DPA guidelines.

sections.heading: Technical cookies (necessary)
sections.body: These are essential to operate the service (for example the authentication session cookie and the one that stores your cookie choices). They require no consent and are always on.

sections.heading: Analytics cookies
sections.body: Any third-party analytics cookies are set only after your consent and help us understand how the platform is used.

sections.heading: Google reCAPTCHA
sections.body: On the authentication pages we use Google reCAPTCHA to protect the forms from automated abuse. Google may collect data according to its own policy.

sections.heading: Managing preferences
sections.body: You can accept or reject non-necessary cookies via the banner. You won't be asked again for 180 days, unless conditions change.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: These terms govern the use of the platform. Baseline document, to be reviewed by a lawyer before selling.

sections.heading: Subject of the service
sections.body: The platform is a multi-tenant CRM provided as SaaS. Use is subject to acceptance of these terms.

sections.heading: Account and security
sections.body: The user is responsible for keeping their credentials confidential and for the activities carried out through their account.

sections.heading: Permitted use
sections.body: Using the service for unlawful purposes or in violation of third-party rights is prohibited. The provider may suspend accounts in case of abuse.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
sections.body: The service is provided "as is". To the extent permitted by law, the provider is not liable for indirect damages arising from use of the service.

cookie.title: We respect your privacy
cookie.body: We use necessary technical cookies and, with your consent, analytics cookies. You can accept, reject or manage your preferences.
cookie.manageDescription: Choose which cookie categories to allow. Necessary cookies are always on.
